title: Voltharion, the Storm's Edge
description: Boss intro for Voltharion in Stormspire Cavern. A hyperactive lightning dragon who has been counting milliseconds.

lines: Static fills the air. Your hair stands on end.
Lightning arcs between stalactites like a tesla coil.

lines.speaker: Voltharion
lines.text: Do you KNOW how BORING it is waiting?!

lines.speaker: Voltharion
lines.text: I've been counting milliseconds! 847,293,461 of them! Give or take!

lines.speaker: Voltharion
lines.text: SLOW?! SLOW IS FOR CPUS WITH THERMAL THROTTLING!

lines.speaker: Voltharion
lines.text: I run at CLOCK SPEED baby!

lines.speaker: Voltharion
lines.text: Your turn timer starts NOW! Actually it started 3 lines ago! YOU'RE ALREADY BEHIND!
